title: Elliott Double Sided Wooden Nail Brush
features: TRADITIONAL DESIGN: The Elliott Nail brush is an essential item for any home of workplace and ideal for deep and effective clean of the hands

DOUBLE SIDED: One side of the brush has standard full bristles for general hand and nail cleaning. The other side has smaller bristles, perfect for cleaning underneath the nail and applying extra pressure for deep cleaning
MULTI-USE: Ideal for hand cleaning after cleaning, gardening, decorating or general cleaning, the bristles are designed to be gentle but firm while cleaning around and under the nails
ERGONOMIC: Made from highly versatile and durable plastic bristles and perfect for use on and under fingernails, Designed to fit comfortably in the hand with a grip handle design for ease of use
ELLIOTT: Has been producing cleaning products for over 70 years and has an extensive range of side sink products ideal for every kitchen
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: contains small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Store out of reach of children and pets. Use only for cleaning hands and feet. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes. Clean thoroughly after use and allow to dry. Store in a dry, well-ventilated environment.
